items.title: With 100 Days Until FIFA World Cup 26, Congress Should Be Concerned
items.description: When funding freezes threaten readiness, lawmakers should be asking whether the financial architecture matches the security burden.

items.title: Why Trump’s ‘Cash for Healthcare’ Idea Likely Wouldn’t Work in Practice
items.description: Last week, Trump proposed cutting out insurers and giving Americans cash to buy their own healthcare, claiming it would lower costs.

items.title: Theravance Drug Fails Another Pivotal Test, Sparking Restructuring, Possible Sale
items.description: Ampreloxetine’s Phase 3 failure in multiple system atrophy is the third disappointing clinical trial outcome for the Theravance Biopharma drug.

items.title: Trump Says U.S. Navy Vessels Could Accompany Tankers in Strait of Hormuz
items.description: Navy vessels have previously been employed as part of Operation Prosperity Guardian to help protect civilian ships in the Red Sea.

items.title: Trump Admin Calls ‘Backsies’ On Law Firm Executive Order Appeals
items.description: Less than 24 hours later, the DOJ is attempting to reverse its surrender.
